title: Agent Update Envelope
description: Non-orchestrator agents submit these to .agents/updates/ instead of patching STATE.json directly. The Orchestrator merges them via merge-updates.py. Conflict policy: when two envelopes set the same dotted path, the one with the later submitted_at timestamp wins. Conflicts are recorded in STATE.json._conflicts for review.

update_id.description: Unique ID for this envelope. Format: UPD-YYYYMMDD-HHMMSS-role[-feature]-NN. Used for idempotency - re-submitting an already-merged envelope is rejected.

submitted_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp. Used for conflict resolution: later submitted_at wins when two envelopes set the same path.

_prompt_version.description: Hash of the prompt file in use when this envelope was created. From STATE.json prompt_versions.

_state_revision_at_start.description: The _state_revision value when the agent read STATE.json. Merge script warns if this is stale.

target_feature.description: The feature this envelope is primarily about. Null for orchestrator-level changes.

resource_claim_id.description: The resource claim ID of the agent session submitting this envelope.

summary.description: Human-readable summary of what this envelope changes and why.

changes.description: Ordered list of changes to apply to STATE.json.

op.description: set: assign a value at a dotted path (overwrites). append: append to a list at a dotted path.

value.description: The value to set or append. Required for both ops.
